title: 20 yrs manual experience translated into LLM analysts.
author: fibspeak
selftext:
[catching the EURUSD top ](https://preview.redd.it/4zzbnla71u2h1.png?width=1422&format=png&auto=webp&s=9b373c179c5d0b82d3a627aede15a133323f43f9)

https://preview.redd.it/6i2qdg6a1u2h1.png?width=1919&format=png&auto=webp&s=19b5b50d88690682888f45fc76470327ba291704

[catching the EURUSD low ](https://preview.redd.it/w9lakz0o1u2h1.png?width=1578&format=png&auto=webp&s=2d49c8dd24ec6c13965e84f6bba978b1bdc999e9)

https://preview.redd.it/cmqxqi1v1u2h1.png?width=1919&format=png&auto=webp&s=41e30488d1fd1a0c19ed41c71ae1ab4ac64baf4b



Net results of different strategy types. 

https://preview.redd.it/timln02a2u2h1.png?width=1502&format=png&auto=webp&s=dfb5dd2a741445c8e36c0fbab341cdbd4fee33d0



Manual performance. 

https://preview.redd.it/5gnqangg2u2h1.png?width=1517&format=png&auto=webp&s=ea0276aa0fe7c688b202a04dbcb4c1be45792f55

LLM relative to me (same pairs, same swings and same strats). 

https://preview.redd.it/08y51pvz2u2h1.png?width=1520&format=png&auto=webp&s=6c6e3772dad8f0c63ba7f32128d0a140f325d203



Professional risk management.  All trades entered with stops. Any large exposure closed before gap risk. 

  
No vanity tracking.  Metrics like "look how much $ I made" or "I won 99% of trades" are dumb and pointless. All my metrics are sanity based, not vanity. We track risk adjusted return, max DDs, EV and brier ranking to see how true realised results are to forecast results. 

Risk standardised to "R" (units of risk). Talking about "I made 10K" etc means nothing. If I have 10 million, risked 5 million and made 10K, I'm a donk - but "I made 10K" still looks good.  Standardized R ranking make the resutls far more honest and more in line with how the strat would react on different account sizes and risk tolerances. 

  
Grounded in hardcoded strategies.  My LLMs have a bit of licence to be chatty (how chatty they can be is being reviewed, I may heavily template the posts to remove chattyness) but under the hood these execute chains of tools calls and hardcoded strategies to emulate the real thinking process I do day to day in manual trading. 



Bots are currently setup to run a social media style site (hence the formatted posts). These can be used for alerts (send me email when x trader enters). They can be used for adversarial agents (assign bull bias only to one, bear bias only to another. let both do their thing, track all the results, flag market conditions and use an "army of experts" to determine the best decision trees). These can plan and manage many pending paths (10 + trade plans can be tracked and pulled up when suitable).  And all of these can also send payloads directly to broker's APIs ... which is of course where the real game is. 

All of this is v1.  They will get much better.
